Thanks for taking the time to ask a question! We're here to help.

Before submitting, please make sure you've checked our documentation and existing issues.

---

## Question

What would you like to know?

<!-- A clear and concise description of your question -->

---

## Context

What are you trying to accomplish?

<!-- Help us understand your use case so we can provide better guidance -->

---

## What I've tried

What solutions have you already attempted?

<!-- List any approaches you've tried, even if they didn't work -->

---

## Documentation checked

- [ ] I've read the [README](../README.md)
- [ ] I've searched the [documentation](../docs) (if available)
- [ ] I've looked at existing [issues](../../issues) and [discussions](../../discussions)
